name: Cake Tower HUD Plus
description:
蛋糕塔 Chapter 3 (Cake Team Towers) 专用纯客户端 HUD：自绘血量条、属性面板、队友头顶血条、怪物追踪、攻击者归属、伤害分配 (L)、K/D/A 统计 (N)。可拖拽 + ModMenu。
Client-only HUD for Cake Team Towers Chapter 3: custom health bars, stats panel, teammate overhead bars, mob tracking, attacker attribution, damage panel (L), K/D/A stats (N). Drag-to-position + ModMenu.

v6.0+ 服务端功能由 OnlyScoutCat 赞助 · 服务器 sc4.i9idc.com:12439
Server-side features (v6.0+) sponsored by OnlyScoutCat · sc4.i9idc.com:12439
